content:
[{"id":"nnvMTG5Sl5","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"📃Foundations Manual","col":12}},{"id":"B-CtTCmVDX","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"The foundations module contains features related to founding and core beliefs/principles of the church.","col":12}},{"id":"Ch1a","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"⛪ Churches","col":12}},{"id":"Ch1b","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"The Churches list shows the churches and/or branches of a parent church. Churches can be organized in a hierarchical order: a parent church can have branches (also called churches).","col":12}},{"id":"Ch1c","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Church-specific entities (Person, Family, Fund, Collection, etc.) have a Church field that is used to group entities by church","col":12}},{"id":"Ch1d","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Multi-Campus Access","col":12}},{"id":"Ch1e","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"User access is automatically limited to the church that is defined on the User document:
- System Manager: sees all records across all churches (no restriction).
- Church Manager / Church User: sees only records belonging to their assigned church.","col":12}},{"id":"Ch1f","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"To assign a user to a church:
1. Open the User record (with System Manager permissions).
2. Set the Church field to the desired church.
3. Save the user. A User Permission is automatically created to limit the user's access to the selected church documents.","col":12}},{"id":"fQeaH6cwov","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Note: Only one root church (a church without a Parent Church) is allowed. All additional churches must be sub-churches with a Parent Church assigned.","col":12}},{"id":"w8oEjl0tNc","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"📔Beliefs","col":12}},{"id":"rx8sNKF0oc","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Beliefs are the foundational principles the church stands for.","col":12}},{"id":"nVhOr1yDL4","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"When adding church beliefs, note the following:
- For each belief, supporting Bible references can be added.","col":12}}]
label: Manual: Foundations
name: Manual: Foundations
title: Manual: Foundations
